entities.name: David
entities.context: Professional who distinguishes three networking arenas and notes common pain points

entities.name: Networking
entities.context: Professional practice most know they should do but lack concrete systems for

entities.name: Job-search networking
entities.context: First arena: targeting roles/companies via connections and cold outreach

entities.name: Internal networking
entities.context: Second arena: building cross-functional relationships inside current company

entities.name: Personal/keep-in-touch networking
entities.context: Third arena: staying connected with past managers, colleagues, friends over time

entities.name: Organization pain point
entities.context: Core challenge: staying organized, remembering who to contact when, following through

relationships.context: Provides framework for understanding networking as three distinct arenas
First of three distinct networking arenas
Second of three distinct networking arenas
Third of three distinct networking arenas
Core barrier across all three networking arenas
